rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT overruled, 10 days to answer. Fifth Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty against the moving defendant. The Court notes Defendant's failure to comply with CRC 2.108. In the future non-compliant and oversized briefs will be stricken. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE KRAJEWSKI HARBERT VS. YEVA INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT YEVA, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith (1) tender and (2) a contract between Plaintiff and moving defendants. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: AGESONG LIVING, LLC ET AL VS. DONALD KUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Expunging Improperly Recorded Memorandum Of Management Agreement.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT DONALD KUNG's Motion For Order Expunging Improperly Recorded Memorandum Of Management Agreement. Hearing Required. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts to resolve the matter considering the possibility of a foreclosure sale if the current sale does not close. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PROPERA P SUNGA JR ET AL VS. DIONISIO TABALOC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs DIONISIO TABALOC, ALMA TABALOC, JOSEPHINE TABALOC and MICKAELLA MANGIO CATU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to December 20, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide Courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than December 4, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)
